lastSummary: Recreated the missing canonical daily note for 2026-04-10 and recorded the overnight/early-morning market-digest activity that had only been visible in local worker/session state.

Reviewed the past hour: git showed no new commits and HEAD remained at 0a87a1f, while the market-moving digest worker stayed healthy with the morning shared digest plus haolun user fanout already emitted.
Re-reviewed both long-lived Discord branch state files with no pending shared-important promotions and stamped fresh review metadata before rerunning automated sync.
